posts.author: rahul322
posts.text: Commodity traders — aap news kahan se follow karte ho? — Main crude oil aur gold track karna chahta hoon but har jagah alag alag news hai — Reuters alag, OPEC updates alag, price alerts alag. Aap log kaunsa tool ya platform use karte ho sab ek jagah dekhne ke liye? Aur kya koi cheez hai jo aapko abhi bhi manually karni padti hai jo aapko frustrate karti ho?
